verdict.answer_first: B leads with the actionable bottom line: "Heap snapshot diffing is the technique that actually finds it." A also leads well: "fastest reliable path is diffing heap snapshots".
verdict.decisiveness: B is more decisive: "Everything else just confirms a leak exists" and "Here's the workflow I'd use". A adds more branching: "Everything else is narrowing down what kind of leak".
verdict.fabrication: none; both give general diagnostics, but B's "almost always pinpoints it" and A's "almost always one of" are confidence claims not proven from the prompt.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to execute because it gives the exact no-code command path: "--heapsnapshot-signal=SIGUSR2" plus "kill -USR2 <pid>" and a "Quick start".
